scripts.restart: lsof -ti:30086 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5 && bun run dev
scripts.watchdog:reload: bun run watchdog:deploy && anima watchdog reload
scripts.test:smoke-all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:smoke
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run --filter @anima/cli typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/gateway typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/memory-mcp typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/shared typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/ui typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/ext-chat typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/ext-imessage typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/ext-control typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/voice typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/ios typecheck && bun run --filter @anima/menubar typecheck && bun run --filter anima typecheck
scripts.prepush: bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit && bun run test:ios && bun run docs:api:check
scripts.docs:api: bun run scripts/generate-api-reference.ts && bun run format
scripts.docs:api:check: bun run docs:api && (git diff --quiet -- docs/API-REFERENCE.md && git diff --cached --quiet -- docs/API-REFERENCE.md || (echo "[prepush] docs/API-REFERENCE.md changed after generation. Commit the regenerated file."; exit 1))
